metadata.title: Nuvvoo – AI Calorie Tracker via Chat | Track Food Without Logging
metadata.description: Track calories by chatting with AI, no databases, no barcode scanning. Nuvvoo learns your habits and helps you stay on track with food, energy, and wellness. Try free.
metadata.ogTitle: Nuvvoo: Just describe your day. AI tracks the rest.
metadata.ogDescription: The calorie tracker that works like ChatGPT. Describe your meals in plain text, and Nuvvoo handles the numbers.

hero.title: Track food and more by chatting, not logging
hero.subtitle: Tell Nuvvoo about your day, sleep, workouts and mood, and week by week it will understand you better.
hero.subtitleLine2: A unique way to track calories through chat.
hero.heroImageChatAlt: Nuvvoo chat screen logging meals in one message
hero.heroImagePlanAlt: Nuvvoo meal plan in dark mode
hero.trustFree: Free to download · Optional Pro features
hero.trustTeam: Made by a 2-person team who actually cares

founder.name: Irina Groylova
founder.title: Why I’m building Nuvvoo
founder.intro: A couple of years ago I started taking migraine medication. The pain went away, but the side effects hit hard: my mood crashed, my weight went up, and it felt like everything was slipping out of control.
founder.p1: I started looking for a way to lose weight and tried a ton of calorie-tracking apps. And kept quitting every time. Not because the apps were bad, but because I didn’t have the energy to do it consistently. It was really hard to search for foods, enter grams… especially while depressed.
founder.p2: But one day I simply wrote in a chat with AI, told it what I’d eaten that day, and asked what I could have for dinner to stay within my calories. It felt so natural. The chat didn’t just give recommendations, it added supportive words too. A quick dopamine hit I’d been missing.
founder.p3: The next day I wrote again. And the next. Within a month it stopped feeling like stress. Talking with the chat about my food became a calm daily ritual.
founder.p4: That’s when I came up with the idea for Nuvvoo: a companion that listens first, counts second, and helps everyone who struggles with procrastination like I do stay in balance. I hope you’ll find your own way to stay balanced, without pressure, with joy.

product.title: One chat instead of ten apps.
product.subtitle: Tell Nuvvoo about your food, sleep, workout, and it’ll count and remember.

philosophy.title: Health without perfection
philosophy.othersSearch: Search the food in a database.
philosophy.othersGrams: Enter the weight to the gram.
philosophy.othersThreeApps: One app for food, another for water, a third for sleep.
philosophy.othersConfigure: Set goals, macros and limits manually.
philosophy.nuvvooOneChat: Food, water, sleep, workouts in one chat.
philosophy.nuvvooLearns: In a week, Nuvvoo knows your habits.

howItWorks.title: A transparent ritual in four steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe in your own words what you ate, how you worked out, your mood, and so on.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Calories and macros calculated. Everything saved.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Dinner ideas, daily balance, and support.
howItWorks.step4Desc: While you rest, Nuvvoo finds patterns and helps you feel calmer.

socialProof.heading: Be the first to try it
socialProof.quote1: I’ve been tracking for 10 days, no urge to quit.
socialProof.quote2: I hate logging food, but I want to watch what I eat. With Nuvvoo it doesn’t feel like constant logging. It’s just a conversation.
socialProof.quote3: I just want something that won’t annoy me. Nuvvoo is a sweet, supportive companion.
